zh.lifeSummary: Thomas Greene於1542年2月2日之前出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾芭比。他於1563年12月9日與Joan Dawson在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1638年3月4日之前在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾德林，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾德林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas Greene于1542年2月2日之前出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾芭比。他于1563年12月9日与Joan Dawson在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1638年3月4日之前在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾德林，埋葬在英国諾廷加姆爾德林。

nameMeanings.name: Greene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Green  . In North America, this surname has assimilated cognates from other languages.

variants.name: Green
meanings: English: either a nickname for someone who was fond of dressing in this color (Old English grēne) or was young or immature, or who had played the part of the ‘Green Man’ in the May Day celebrations, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a village green (Middle English grene, a transferred use of the color term). This is one of the most common and widespread of English surnames. In North America it has assimilated cognates from other languages, notably German Grün (see Gruen ) and Dutch Groen ; compare 7 below. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: alternatively, from a Middle English personal name Grene.
Irish: adopted for Ó hUainín ‘descendant of Uainín’, a personal name from a pet form of uaine ‘green’, see Honan .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: Thomas Greene was born before 2 February 1542, in Barby, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. He married Joan Dawson on 9 December 1563, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died before 4 March 1638, in Gedling, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Gedling, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Thomas Greene est né avant 2 février 1542, à Barby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Joan Dawson le 9 décembre 1563, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé avant 4 mars 1638, à Gedling, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Gedling, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Thomas Greene wurde vor 2. Februar 1542 in Barby, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat am 9. Dezember 1563 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Joan Dawson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb vor 4. März 1638 in Gedling, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Gedling, Nottinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Thomas Greene è nato il prima del 2 febbraio 1542 nel Barby, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Joan Dawson il 9 dicembre 1563, nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì prima del 4 marzo 1638, nel Gedling, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Gedling, Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Greeneは1542年2月2日以前にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアバービーで生まれた。1563年12月9日にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでJoan Dawsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1638年3月4日以前にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアジェドリングで死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアジェドリングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Greene(은)는 1542년 2월 2일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 바비에서 태어났다. 그는 1563년 12월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 Joan Dawson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1638년 3월 4일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 게들링에서 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 게들링에 묻혔다.

pt.Bef 2 Feb 1542–Bef 4 Mar 1637/38: antes 2 de fevereiro de 1542–antes 4 de março de 1638
pt.lifeSummary: Thomas Greene nasceu antes 2 de fevereiro de 1542, em Barby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Joan Dawson em 9 de dezembro de 1563, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 4 de março de 1638, em Gedling, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Gedling, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomas Greene родился перед 2 февраль 1542 г. в местности барби, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Dawson 9 декабря 1563 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер перед 4 марта 1638 г. в местности джедлинг, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности джедлинг, ноттингхамшир, Англия.
